authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly identified the D2/D3 freeze vs D1/D4 no-freeze discrepancy, then resolved it by citing D4 (CEO: pause was 'premature' and 'reversed'; 'Engineering and Sales hiring continues'; system block being removed) and treating D2/D3 as a temporary, now-overridden state. It did not dismiss lower-level evidence; it used D3 to corroborate that the pause was briefly enforced while still concluding the current policy is no freeze per CEO.
